title: Keys Day
content: I helped a couple buy their first home last year. The day they got the keys? They just stood in the empty living room for ten minutes. Crying. Happy tears. That's why I do this. That moment. When planning becomes REAL.
extended_content: All those spreadsheets, all those house tours, all those 'is this the one?' conversations - it all led to that moment. Empty living room, afternoon light coming through the windows, and two people who couldn't stop crying. They kept saying 'We did it. We actually did it.' Planning isn't about the plan. It's about that moment.
when_to_tell: when helping with first home planning
lesson: Big planning leads to big moments
